content: Update MOD-001: 'Crear ingrediente nuevo' continues to pantry form; save with user_ingredient_id; simplified unit selector + helper text + pending banner
Update MOD-001 search: also query user_ingredients; display 'Pendiente' pill on results
Update PantryScreen fetch: include user_ingredient_id + join user_ingredients; synthetic 'Pendientes de validacin' group
Update MOD-002 EditPantryItemModal: base-unit-only selector + helper text for quarantine items
Update PantryItemRow: render 'Pendiente' pill when user_ingredient_id is present
Add recipe title duplicate check on Step 1 and Step 5 (trim+lowercase, accent-sensitive, exclude drafts and self)
